name: Graveyard
hints: A graveyard with graves and a saw. The saw may be useful. Try digging in the graves.
GET SAW and GET CLOVER (four-leaf clover hidden in the graves). DIG in the graveyard.
GET SAW. DIG here to find the four-leaf clover (good luck charm needed for the final ritual). GET CLOVER.
GET SAW, DIG to find the four-leaf clover. The clover is one of the three items needed for YELL CHANT. EAST to torture chamber.
notes: Graveyard with a rusting saw and hidden four-leaf clover (found by digging). The clover is one of the three essential items for the final YELL CHANT ritual. EAST leads to the torture chamber (room 13).
